commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete job model-swap clean-bin-index --ignore-not-found 2>&1; echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/clean-bin-index.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/clean-bin-index.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs -l job-name=clean-bin-index --prefix 2>&1 | head -40'
